cover: Split-screen comparison infographic: 'LWC Native State Management in Summer 26'. Deep navy blue bold header. LEFT COLUMN 'Wire Adapter Sprawl' soft red and grey with bold blue-grey header box: blocks for '@wire(getRecord) in 7 components', 'duplicate UI API calls', 'stale sibling component state' each with small warning icon. Central flow diagram showing tangled red lines between AccountHeader, OpportunityPanel, CaseTimeline, RenewalSummary. RIGHT COLUMN 'Native LWC Store' soft green and blue with bright blue header box: blocks for 'single accountWorkspaceStore', 'imperative load once', 'selectors for derived state'. Central glowing node 'Native State Store' with clean straight lines to Header, Panels, Actions. Speedometer labeled FAST pointing green. Clean vector SaaS aesthetic, deep navy, teal, and blue palette on light blue-grey background.
images: System architecture diagram: 'Summer 26 LWC Native State Workspace'. Light grey background with faint grid. Dark bold header block 'Account Workspace State Ownership'. Subtitle 'Replace duplicated wire adapters with one native store and explicit refresh boundaries'. Top-right: profile badge 'Bennie Joseph | Architect'. LAYER 1 'UI Components' pastel blue: modules 'AccountHeader', 'RiskBanner', 'OpenCasesPanel'. LAYER 2 'Native LWC State' pastel green: modules 'accountWorkspaceStore', 'selectors', 'actions'. LAYER 3 'Salesforce Data' pastel purple: modules 'Apex DTO', 'UI API v64.0', 'Data Cloud Signals'. Central node 'Single Account Workspace State' with rotating arrow, dotted directional connectors to all layers. INTEGRATION LAYER upper right: 'Agentforce 2.0 Panel' and 'Einstein Recommendations'. BOTTOM PANEL 'Refresh Rules': sub-modules 'load once', 'optimistic update', 'invalidate after save' with flow arrows. Rounded rectangle containers, dotted arrowheads, micro vector icons, modern sans-serif fonts, publication-ready engineering diagram.

Split-screen comparison infographic: 'Wire Adapters vs Native LWC State in Enterprise Consoles'. Deep navy blue bold header. LEFT COLUMN 'Before: Component-Owned Data' soft red and grey with bold blue-grey header box: blocks for '9 data calls on load', '4 loading spinners', 'risk logic copied 3 times', 'Agentforce context stale' each with warning icon. Central flow diagram showing tangled lines between Header, Cases, Renewal, AgentforcePanel, DataCloudSignals. RIGHT COLUMN 'After: Store-Owned Workspace' soft green and blue with bright blue header box: blocks for '3 data calls on load', 'one loading boundary', 'selectors own risk logic', 'Agentforce context refreshed from store'. Central glowing node 'accountWorkspaceStore' with clean straight lines to components. Speedometer labeled CONSISTENT pointing green. Clean vector SaaS aesthetic, deep navy, teal, blue palette on light blue-grey background.
